title: calophyllum gracilipes
intro: Calophyllum gracilipes, also known as the 'Bintangor tree', is a species of plant in the family Calophyllaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antifungal, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties. The extracts of the plant have been found to have various health benefits, including antioxidant, anti-cancer, and cardiovascular-protective effects. In traditional medicine, Calophyllum gracilipes is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and topical creams to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
